user.title: Connect to PC Remote
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PC running the PC Remote service.

zeroconf_confirm.title: PC Remote discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: A PC Remote service was found at {host}:{port}. Enter the API key to connect.

select_mac.title: Select Network Interface
select_mac.description: Select the network interface to use for Wake-on-LAN.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PC Remote
reconfigure.description: Update connection details for your PC Remote service.

reconfigure_select_mac.title: Select Network Interface
reconfigure_select_mac.description: Host changed — select the network interface for Wake-on-LAN.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the service. Check host and port.
error.no_mac_addresses: No network interfaces found. The service may need to be updated.
